detail.description:
▣ Your Choices Shape the World ▣
In Rellion, a forgotten realm now ruled only by NPCs, you step in as the “True Player.”
What path will you choose in this fading world? Shape your destiny in Rellion.

▣ Game Features ▣

[Legendary Rewards Just for Logging In]
• Instantly receive an SSR Hero
• Start your adventure with a powerful companion by your side

[Infinite Growth & Alchemy Gem System]
• Auto-grow even while you’re offline
• Claim all your overnight resources with a single tap
• Rewards acc
